title: lithocarpus balansae
intro: Lithocarpus balansae, also known as the Balansa's Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus balansae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
